content.en:
"The Boulder Tribe has built this ancient nest very well, even a strong person at the peak of the transformation level can hardly break the defensive barrier of the ancient nest!"

Stygian looked at the ancient nest, and soon had a way to enter it.

He could also forcibly break the barrier of the Boulder Ancient Nest, but in that case, the transformation-level powerhouses of the Boulder Tribe would know about his arrival.

When the time came, the dozens of avatar-level powerhouses of the Boulder Tribe fled one by one, and he didn't know which one to chase and kill, and who had the eternal flint on him.

Therefore, he still chose the safest way, which was to control the clansmen of a certain megalith tribe and attach themselves to the other party to infiltrate the monolithic nest.

At the moment, the original antiquities of the Boulder Tribe have not yet come out, but the Boulder Nest is not a completely closed ancient nest, and the Boulder Tribe will occasionally manipulate some clansmen to enter and exit the Boulder Ancient Nest, or bring a batch of primordial antiquities into the Boulder Ancient Nest.

This gives Hades a chance.

this day.

Stygian Cloud finally waited for a batch of primordial antiquities to enter the boulder ancient grass, and he silently attached to the other party's body, and with a little control, he could ensure that he would not find out.

After entering the Monolithic Lair, Stygian Cloud left.

With his strength and the meaning of nothingness, even the most powerful avatar-level peak powerhouse of the Boulder Tribe would not want to discover him.

Of course, he can't make a move, and once he does, he will be exposed.

He must find the Eternal Flint before he can do it, so he can be sure that he will capture the Eternal Flint himself!

"Although the treasure of the Eternal Flint can be placed inside the space treasure, after a long time, the space treasure cannot withstand the breath of the Eternal Flint Stone. If the Monolithic Tribe wants to preserve the Eternal Flint for a long time, they must build a place specifically to preserve the Eternal Flint. Previously, when they were in the Primordial Ancient Sea, they evacuated the Eternal Flint Stone, but there was not enough time for them to completely erase the breath of the Eternal Flint Stone, and this was the clue that we discovered. Now, the Boulder Tribe must have built a place inside this ancient nest to store the Eternal Flint Stone, as long as you find this place!"

Stygian felt that it should not be difficult to find such a place, after all, such a place was not ordinary, and it was necessary to arrange a powerful formation and suppress the aura of the eternal flint with special treasures.

Time passed slowly, and Stygian searched for many areas, and finally found the place where the Eternal Flint existed somewhere in the Ancient Nest of the Giant Stone.

"This is it!"

Stygian said excitedly.

Moreover, he also discovered the two powerhouses of the Giant Stone Tribe who were hiding here.

With two incarnate level peak powerhouses in charge, there must be a real Eternal Flint here.

However, he couldn't infiltrate the inside of this large array, and he had to force his shot.

"Broken!"

Stygian Cloud shot directly!

Rumble!!!

The formation here was immediately broken, and it couldn't stop the blow of the dark cloud at all.

And those two incarnate level peak powerhouses naturally discovered the Stygian Cloud, but they couldn't stop the Stygian Cloud.

With the strength of the Stygian Cloud, only when ten Physoid Peak powerhouses joined forces could they have any hope of confronting.

Stygian Cloud didn't pay attention to these two transformation-level peak powerhouses, but tore through the shattered array and the void with one hand, and saw inside.

In this shattered void, there was a touch of powder, releasing a strong aura of flames.

Seeing this scene, Stygian didn't know that he had been deceived!

This is clearly not the Eternal Flint Stone, but the powder of the Eternal Flint Stone, and the Boulder Tribe actually sealed a little powder here, creating the illusion that the Eternal Flint is here!

"I'm afraid that the Boulder Tribe is worried that our Hades Tribe will come to snatch the Eternal Flint Stone, and it is really cunning to do this on purpose!"

Stygian Cloud said coldly.

Rumble!!!!

The origin of the Boulder Lair has been mobilized, and a one-bit incarnate has emerged.

These avatar levels formed a battle array, based on the entire boulder, to contend with him.

Stygian didn't dare to linger any longer, although he was sure to compete with the entire Boulder tribe, and even kill some of the avatar tiers.

But if you do that, you will be at risk, and you may even be injured or even fall.

What's more, this is not the original ancient sea, and he has no support.

The forces of the Silent Black Sea were happy to see him fall, so if they found him, they feared that they would immediately take action.

"Let's go!"

Stygian Cloud broke through the blockade and fled towards the outside of the boulder's lair.

Thundered!!!!

The battle is on!

The Boulder Tribe did not intend to let him go, but frantically attacked the Stygian Cloud.

Even so, Stygian Cloud was still not left behind by them, after all, his strength was much more powerful than these avatar levels.

However.

Just when the dark cloud had just rushed out of the boulder tribe, he was cut off by the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor in the Yellow Building.

"Up to the Enhancement Level!"

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor was taken aback.

This is obviously not the incarnation level of the Boulder Tribe, why did he break into the Boulder Ancient Lair and have a conflict with the entire Boulder Tribe?

He hadn't been involved in such a battle, and with his strength, he wasn't the best opponent at the level of a fortified object.

And without knowing it, it was impossible for him to participate in the battle between the tribes of the Primordial Antiquities.

However, he still passed the news to several Supreme Nine Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building.

But even if the Nine-Fold Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building came, he would not be able to intercept it, and this Supreme Strength Sect would definitely leave.

Sure enough, Stygian soon left.

However, this battle attracted the attention of many Dao Ancestors.

After all, Stygian Cloud also briefly fought a few times near the entrance of the Boulder Ancient Lair, shattering countless primordial antiquities, and even some nearby community boundaries were shattered, killing countless living beings.

Not long after, the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor of the Nine-Story Building arrived, and the Extreme Ninefold Ancestor of other top forces also came.

......

"At the fortification level, this kind of existence has actually entered the Boulder Ancient Lair from the Primordial Ancient Sea!"

Ye Tian was really shocked when he got the news.

At this moment, he thought of the reason why the Boulder Tribe had evacuated from the Primordial Ancient Sea, and he still didn't know what that reason was.

The Giant Stone Tribe said to have offended other big tribes, but if you think about it carefully, this possibility is not necessarily right, if you really offend other big tribes, you can find a backer, and there is no need to move the clan.

In this way, the prospect of the development of the Boulder tribe is gone, and it is better to pay the price and ask other big tribes to protect it.

If it weren't for this reason, it could only be that the Boulder Tribe had an opportunity or treasure that even the enhancement level coveted.

And this time, the other party infiltrated the ancient nest of the boulder, instead of attacking it directly, and it can be seen from here that the other party is afraid that he is looking for something.

Ye Tian could think of it, and other Dao Ancestors could naturally think of it too.

As a result, many Supreme Ninefold Ancestors came to the Giant Stone Ancient Lair to learn the truth.
